overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Nasdaq Biotechnology (BIS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ / Biotechnology index. The fund provides -2x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies listed on the NASDAQ. BIS was launched on Apr 8, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
